mapper.select: SELECT user_id, station_name AS stationName, created_at FROM favorite_air_locations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_air_locations ( user_id, station_name, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{stationName}, NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite_air_locations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND station_name = #{stationName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_call_logs ( user_id, request_url, status, call_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{requestUrl}, #{status}, NOW() )
